nuggets.headline: jamee cornelia led a punk band while building her hip-hop career in atlanta
nuggets.text: Before fully embracing her solo hip-hop sound, Jamee Cornelia was the lead vocalist for a punk band called Howling Star for four years. During this intense period, she also co-founded the Punk Black concert series and simultaneously developed her solo work within the hip-hop collective Visibly Inflight in the Atlanta area.

source.title: Conversations with the Inspiring Jamee Cornelia
source.quoteSnippet: I was also a lead vocalist for a punk band called Howling Star for 4 years and we started our own concert series called Punk Black while I was also in a hip-hop collective called Visibly Inflight for my solo work.

nuggets.imageCaption: Jamee Cornelia, a genre-bending artist from the Atlanta scene.

nuggets.headline: jamee cornelia channels her multimedia curation skills into artist 'roll out' planning
nuggets.text: Beyond making her own music, Jamee Cornelia is deeply involved in the visual side of the industry, known for her distinctive video editing style and multimedia curation. She leverages these talents to help artists on her indie label, L7 Records, craft their 'roll out' plans and content strategies, ensuring their releases look as good as they sound.

source.title: Conversations with the Inspiring Jamee Cornelia
source.quoteSnippet: I am probably most known for my video editing style and my live performances... What I’m most proud of is Multi-Media curation. I’m really good and making things look cool with film and graphics, lol! I shoot film as well and help an artist with the label my and my friends started with 'roll out' planning and content curation.

nuggets.headline: if you dig jamee cornelia, you need to check out namir blade
nuggets.text: If Jamee Cornelia's blend of Hip-Hop and Alternative Hip-Hop is hitting right, you absolutely have to hear namir blade. Both artists are vibrant voices in the contemporary underground hip-hop scene, often found pushing creative boundaries within the genre.

artistSummary: Jamee Cornelia is a multi-talented hip-hop artist and creative from the Atlanta area. She blends her solo music career with directing music videos and co-running her own indie label, L7 Records, always pushing artistic boundaries.
